title: Real-Time Signal Propagation During Building
description: Click input nodes to toggle values, signals propagate through wires immediately during construction.

changes.what: Add click handler on input nodes to toggle their value (0→1, 1→0). After toggling, run simulation.evaluateOnce() to propagate signals. Mark dirty for re-render.
During non-animated state, render wire signal values visually (color wires carrying 1 vs 0).

acceptance: Clicking an input node toggles its value between 0 and 1
Signal propagates through connected gates/wires immediately
Wire colors reflect signal values (green=1, gray=0)
Input node visually shows current value
